phase: Phase R0-G4 Active Hash Interaction Simulator Import
notes: The imported simulator is routed separately at /active-hash and does not replace the root Production Terminal Governance Console.
The simulator is client-local readonly evidence software: no backend mutation, no wallet calls, no chain calls, no transaction submission, and no Squads or treasury mutation logic.
The scaffold package.json, package-lock.json, app/layout.tsx, and root page were not copied wholesale.
Local tsx tests initially failed because node_modules contained the linux-arm64 esbuild binary on macOS arm64; npm rebuild esbuild repaired local node_modules without changing package manifests.

npm audit --omit=dev reports existing moderate advisories through @solana/web3.js wallet-adapter dependencies and viem/ws. This simulator import did not add package dependencies or package-lock changes.
